overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a long coat exploring a post-apocalyptic urban environment. The character walks through narrow passages with red structural beams, past abandoned vehicles and industrial debris, toward massive ruined tower buildings under an overcast dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with red structural support beams

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow path bordered by a building wall and metal fence, approaching red structural beams

entered.detail: tall red support beams forming a corridor-like structure ahead
weathered concrete wall with stone foundation running alongside the path
iron fence with vertical bars separating the path from adjacent property

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow urban passage flanked by a concrete building wall and black metal fence. Red structural pillars loom ahead, creating a corridor-like formation in the dim, overcast light.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial area with overhead pipes and ventilation equipment

events.description: character makes a sharp right turn to navigate around the building corner

agents.ego_description: turning right and proceeding under large industrial pipes while passing ventilation units and abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: massive cylindrical pipe running overhead between buildings
large industrial ventilation equipment with circular grilles mounted on building exterior
derelict vehicle parked along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into an industrial area dominated by a massive overhead pipe. Red structural pillars recede to the left while ventilation units and an abandoned car appear along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ruined city street with debris and overturned vehicles

events.description: exiting the narrow industrial passage into a wide open ruined street with visible sky and distant towers

agents.ego_description: walking through the devastated street past abandoned cars, rubble piles, and an overturned truck

entered.detail: large red cargo truck flipped on its side blocking part of the street
massive cylindrical concrete tower with vertical red stripes dominating the skyline
damaged multi-story industrial structure with broken windows and debris

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide devastated street under an overcast sky. An overturned red truck lies on the right while a massive concrete tower rises in the distance. The character navigates through rubble and past abandoned vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching massive damaged tower in city center

agents.ego_description: approaching the base of the massive cylindrical tower while navigating past concrete barriers

entered.detail: tall concrete wall blocking off a section of the ruined street
circular parking sign with letter P visible on a pole

segments.scene_description: The character continues toward the massive concrete tower, which now dominates the center of the frame. Concrete barriers and a parking sign appear along the path as the character moves deeper into the ruined city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic urban corridor that gradually opens into a vast, devastated city center. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage between a concrete wall and a black metal fence, moving toward a series of looming red structural pillars under a dim, overcast sky. As the character turns right, the scene shifts into an industrial zone where the pillars recede to make way for a massive overhead pipe, ventilation units, and an abandoned car. The environment then expands into a wide, ruined street featuring an overturned red truck and scattered rubble, revealing a massive concrete tower rising in the distance. Finally, the camera pushes forward past concrete barriers and a parking sign as the towering structure grows to dominate the frame, drawing the character deeper into the heart of the ruins.
